channel.title: Chirantan Roy Choudhury on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Chirantan Roy Choudhury on LMI

item.title: Magneto-structural and theoretical study of the weak interactions in aMn(II) complex with a very unusual N,O-chelating coordination mode of2-aminoterephthalate
Design of end-on cyanato bridged trinuclear Cu(II) Schiff base complexwith salen type Schiff base ligand: synthesis, structural investigationand DFT study
Synthesis, crystal structure, antimicrobial screening and densityfunctional theory calculation of nickel(II), cobalt(II) and zinc(II)mononuclear Schiff base complexes
